steps.title: Read a clear point off the graph
steps.content: The line crosses the $y$-axis at the point $(0,2)$, an easy lattice point to read. That one point is enough because the equation is already in the form $4x+By=12$ and only $B$ is unknown.

steps.title: Confirm the choice
steps.content: The value $B=6$ matches D. The key shortcut is using the visible $y$-intercept: one graph point is enough because only one coefficient is unknown.
